title: 7 Best Herbal Remedies for Ulcerative Colitis Using Essential Oils
description: Curcuma longa, also known as turmeric, has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The essential oil extracted from turmeric contains a powerful compound called curcumin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. When applied to the skin or ingested in small amounts, curcumin can help reduce inflammation in the digestive tract. This is particularly beneficial for people with ulcerative colitis, a condition characterized by chronic inflammation of the colon. Curcumin's anti-infla...
